mapper.select:
SELECT sv.id, sv.prob_id AS probId, sv.soft_version_code AS softVersionCode, sv.soft_version_name AS softVersionName, sv.create_time AS createTime, sv.create_by AS createBy, m.probNum, m.theme FROM prob_soft_version sv LEFT JOIN prob_main m ON sv.prob_id = m.id WHERE sv.effective_to IS NULL
AND sv.prob_id = #{params.probId}
AND sv.soft_version_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.softVersionCode}, '%')
ORDER BY sv.create_time DESC
